# /dmf-package

> Build a DMF (Data Management Framework) data package — a `.zip` containing a `Manifest.xml`, package header, and per-data-entity definition group files. Used for reference-data seeding, cutover migrations, and post-go-live reconciliations.

## Usage

```
/dmf-package [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--package <name>]
```

`--package <name>` lets you produce multiple separately-named packages from one feature (useful for staging vs cutover).

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/output/dmf/*.xml` (per-entity DMF project XMLs)
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/output/dmf/data/*.csv` (entity data files)
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tdd.md § DEN-NN` rows (entity catalogue)

## Execution flow

1. Validate that all DEN-NN tasks for this feature are `implementation-status: done`.
2. Collect per-entity DMF XMLs + data CSVs from `output/dmf/`.
3. Generate the package `Manifest.xml`:
   - `<Entity>` per DEN-NN with `Name`, `Order` (per task dependencies), `SourceFormat=CSV`, `TargetEntity` (data-entity name)
4. Zip into `output/_packages/{feature}{-package}-{ts}.dmf.zip` with the structure DMF expects (`Manifest.xml` at root + `<DataEntity>/` folders).
5. Emit `output/_packages/{feature}{-package}-{ts}.dmf.log.md` summarising entities included, row counts, sequence.

## Output

- `output/_packages/{feature}{-package}-{ts}.dmf.zip`
- `output/_packages/{feature}{-package}-{ts}.dmf.log.md`
